text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Inari One chatting with one of her
classmates after class.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sigh... School's finally over. Maybe I should hit up a bathhouse.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Can I join you? You're going to the usual
bathhouse with the boiling hot water, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's the plan. Only... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Except I was kinda thinkin' of takin' a long,
relaxin' soak instead of a quick, hot dip.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Might be nice to try out a lukewarm tub for a
change.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
What?! I-Inari... didn't you say that lukewarm
water's for the faint of heart?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The back-to-back races seem to be taking a toll
on Inari One. It might be wise to consider revising
her race schedule.
